summary: Recording plagued by corrupt FLAC files, rendering it unlistenable and leaving the show quality unknown
review: The sole reviewer reports that a large portion of the FLAC files are corrupted, making playback impossible until fixed. Because the audio cannot be heard, no assessment of the musical performance or setlist can be made.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review focusing on file corruption; recording is effectively unusable and there is no information about the show itself.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple corrupt FLAC files reported; playback issues prevent evaluation of clarity or mix.
